unreleased: Fixed Claude sign-in getting stuck when authorization step is missed — now shows a retry button
Added built-in Claude account option (Vertex AI) - no personal Claude sign-in needed
Added pin toggle (⌘P) to keep the floating dialog open when clicking away
Added Response Style setting for floating bar (Off/Soft/Strict) to control answer compactness
Added stop button and follow-up-while-streaming to floating bar
Chat persists when clicking away from floating bar; collapses to half-height semi-transparent preview and restores on focus
Replaced pin button with New Chat button in floating bar
Removed background style (solid/transparent) toggle from settings
Code snippets in floating bar are now collapsed to 5 lines with a quick copy button
Moved floating bar to bottom of screen — chat now expands upward
Post-onboarding tutorial now continues as a guided chat in the floating bar with 3 test prompts
Added Google Workspace integration — ask about your email, calendar, and files directly from the floating bar
Fixed exploration text blocks running together without line breaks
Improved exploration card with larger pulsating toggle button and inline loading animation
Added visible loading animation when transcribing voice input after push-to-talk
Fixed follow-up messages failing while AI is still generating a response
Stop button now stays visible during AI streaming and is colored red
Bundled mcp-server-macos-use binary inside the app for built-in macOS automation support
Screen capture and macOS automation now uses native accessibility APIs instead of browser screenshot
Fixed AI responses appearing concatenated without spaces when using tool calls or chain of thought
Added staging update channel for pre-release testing
Fixed memory crash during initial file indexing on large filesystems
Fixed Right Command push-to-talk triggering on Left Cmd and modifier combos
Optimized memory usage in file indexing service
Fixed floating bar horizontal jumps and screen switching on multi-monitor setups
Added copy buttons to messages and conversations in floating bar
Fixed plain text copying in markdown responses
Fixed orphaned ACP bridge processes on quit
Added escape key hint to floating bar close button
Added suggested reply buttons after AI responses in the floating bar
Improved update experience: shows helpful guidance when macOS blocks auto-updates due to App Management permission
Fixed chat getting permanently stuck after a temporary API error
Reduced default chat height by half and persist user resize preference across sessions
Fixed infinite retry loop when built-in credits run out — now auto-switches to personal Claude account
Fixed push-to-talk input being lost when clicking away without sending
Added Sentry error reporting to critical error paths (database, chat, audio, auth) for better production issue visibility
Added comprehensive analytics tracking: session duration, conversation depth, tool success/failure, floating bar response metrics, credit exhaustion, and onboarding start events
Raised collapsed floating bar position slightly for better visibility
Changed default push-to-talk key to Left Control for easier access
Added Sign in with Google and Sign in with Apple authentication
Follow-up chat input now wraps text like the initial input
Improved sign-in experience with branded browser page, deep link back to app, and auto-close of settings window
Fixed floating bar showing "Something went wrong" instead of re-prompting Claude sign-in when OAuth expires
Fixed "Fazm was prevented from modifying apps" privacy warning on launch
Added session recording for beta users (feature-flagged)
Added compaction indicator showing when AI is compacting context during long conversations
Improved session recovery to resume previous sessions after crashes instead of starting fresh
Fixed floating bar randomly starting a new session when switching between built-in and personal Claude accounts
Fixed floating bar losing session context when Claude re-authentication (OAuth) was required mid-conversation
Fixed a crash on macOS 26 caused by a window constraint feedback loop during AI response resize
Fixed main window not coming to front after signing in
Fixed crash during AI response streaming caused by overlapping window resize animations
Fixed floating bar window expanding beyond screen bounds during long conversations
Fixed SQLite syntax error when AI generates double-escaped datetime queries
Auto-retry update after granting App Management permission in System Settings
Bundled skills now update automatically when the app ships improvements — a brief toast notification appears when any skill is refreshed
Added Report an Issue button to the response header — icon-only with tooltip; flashes orange if AI is stuck thinking for 30+ seconds
Report issue button now flashes on startup if the previous session crashed unexpectedly
Fixed "AI service temporarily unavailable" errors caused by oversized screenshots accumulating in long sessions
Fixed Playwright screenshots exceeding API dimension limits on Retina displays
Fixed 401 auth errors not triggering re-authentication, causing users to get stuck with "AI service temporarily unavailable" errors
Screen recording now only captures when you're actively interacting with the app
Authentication now opens in Chrome instead of the default browser, so existing sessions are available
Added Home tab as default landing page with usage guide, floating bar toggle, stats, and recent activity
Fixed AI queries hanging silently when rate limit is reached — now shows sign-in prompt
API keys are now fetched from the backend instead of being bundled in the app binary
Renamed internal MCP server from omi-tools to fazm-tools and added diagnostic logging for tool calls
Claude account now connects immediately when switching to Your Claude Account in Settings
Added loading spinner when viewing CLAUDE.md and skill files in settings
Fixed noisy Sentry reports when no microphone is available, added retry logic and "No microphone detected" hint in Settings
Fixed issue where completing Claude sign-in would dismiss the popup without retrying the interrupted query
Fixed Claude sign-in window appearing off-screen on multi-monitor setups
Fixed chat messages disappearing and stale error button after browser extension setup
Fixed security issue: API keys are no longer bundled in the app. Authentication now uses per-user Firebase tokens
Floating bar is now draggable by default
Show full message text in recent messages instead of truncating, and added copy-to-clipboard button
Fixed phantom/ghost floating bar window appearing after closing with Esc
Fixed floating bar vertical position not restoring correctly in draggable mode
Fixed blank code blocks in floating bar chat and added syntax highlighting
Made recent messages scrollable with inline timestamps
Optimized AI response rendering to prevent app hangs during complex responses
Fixed crash when copying plain text from AI responses
Fixed voice input failing when API keys are not yet loaded on startup
Added Connect Claude button in floating bar when credits run out or auth is needed
Added Connect Claude button to floating bar for quick sign-in when Claude account is disconnected
Fixed app appearing unresponsive — now shows a "not responding" message and stops the agent after 60 seconds
Improved screenshot handling: captures screen earlier and stores more efficiently for better AI context
Replaced Google Workspace integration with a native Python MCP server for more reliable Gmail, Calendar, and Drive access
Improved browser extension setup window layout
Fixed Chrome opening to use the active profile instead of a new window
Fixed model not being applied correctly after resuming a previous session
Fixed false auth error detection causing unnecessary sign-in prompts
Reset Onboarding now also signs out, disconnects browser extension, Claude account, and Google Workspace
Fixed app showing as damaged after update due to invalid Python venv symlinks in bundle
Fixed post-onboarding tutorial not showing after resetting onboarding
Added Settings menu item (Cmd+,) and fixed window not reopening after close
